task_objective: Migrate QAM status values, last operation details, and version list text styling to inline React styles to ensure correct rendering inside the Steam UI document context.
design_decisions: Moved font-size (10px) and text colors (failed red #f87171, loading blue #60a5fa, text #cbd5e1) directly to React inline styles in index.tsx.
Preserved and cleaned layout properties in index.css (flex alignments, margins, text-overflow truncation).
Aligned test assertions to verify inline-styled JSX elements.
results: All python unit tests passed, ruff lint/format passed, typecheck passed, and frontend rollup build compiled successfully.
